nasb.text: (for He who effectually worked for Peter in his apostleship to the circumcised effectually worked for me also to the Gentiles),

esv.text: (for he who worked through Peter for his apostolic ministry to the circumcised worked also through me for mine to the Gentiles),

ccb.text: 上帝感动了彼得，呼召他做犹太人的使徒，祂也同样感动了我，呼召我做外族人的使徒。

csbs.text: 因为在彼得里面做工、使他做受割礼之人使徒的那一位，也在我里面做工、使我做外邦人的使徒。
